mechanism_narrative: A rise in the unemployment rate signals a weakening labor market, which compresses demand for goods and services, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in tightening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the housing market signals a decrease in demand for goods and services, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls below 1000 units in 2 consecutive months
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in tightening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in industrial production signals a decrease in supply, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO falls below 100 units in 2 consecutive months
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in tightening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the federal funds rate signals a tightening monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in tightening periods are significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the consumer price index signals an increase in demand for goods and services, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in expansion periods are significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the labor market signals a weakening economy, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE falls below 4.5% in 2 consecutive months
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in tightening periods are significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the payrolls employment series signals an increase in demand for goods and services, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in expansion periods are significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the industrial production signals a decrease in supply, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO falls below 80 units in 2 consecutive months
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in tightening periods are significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).
